description_long: This is a sporty orange coupe car with a bold aerodynamic design, featuring a prominent rear spoiler and aggressive front air intakes. The body is streamlined with sharp lines and a low stance, suggesting high performance and speed. The car has four doors, blacked-out windows, and multi-spoke alloy wheels, giving it a modern and dynamic appearance. The front end is characterized by angular headlights and a sculpted hood with dual vents. The rear showcases a wide bumper, integrated taillights, and a large wing spoiler for added downforce. The overall look is reminiscent of rally-inspired street cars, suitable for urban and suburban environments.
description: A sporty orange coupe car with a rear spoiler, blacked-out windows, and aggressive styling, featuring four doors and alloy wheels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angular headlights, sculpted hood with vents, and aggressive front bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four-door layout, side skirts, alloy wheels, and rear spoiler.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide bumper, integrated taillights, and prominent rear wing spoiler.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the door configuration, wheels, and aerodynamic features.
attribute_window_configuration: four-door coupe with two side windows per side
